title: Xtra Flaky Portuguese Marshmallows Pastries
description: A yeasty and flaky Portuguese pastry featuring miniature marshmallows and a hint of smoke, friendly to dairy-free diets. This nostalgic dessert is perfect for special occasions.

ingredients.name: non-dairy milk
ingredients.notes: such as almond or soy milk

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, yeast, salt, and sugar.
Gradually add the non-dairy milk to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut out small squares of dough, about 3 inches per side.
Place a few miniature marshmallows in the center of each square.
Fold the dough over the marshmallows to form a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Brush the tops of the pastries with melted vegan butter and sprinkle with smoked paprika.
Bake the pastries for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
